title: Title 14: COURT PROCEDURE -- CIVIL §1 — Treasurers may bring action in own name
text:
§1. Treasurers may bring action in own name
Treasurers of state, counties, towns and corporations may maintain civil actions in their own names as treasurers on contracts given to them or their predecessors and prosecute civil actions pending in the names of their predecessors.
chapter: Chapter 1: PARTIES AND TITLE OF ACTIONS
section_heading: Treasurers may bring action in own name
